Travel Packing Guide
CountryConveyorSuitcase
Interactive travel preparation

Pack your
essentials

Choose a destination and collect only the items you want. Essentials for each country rotate on the airport conveyor belt. Tap an item to place it softly into your open suitcase.

Preview
A soft airport ritual.

This web experience turns packing into a calm interaction. Instead of reading a static checklist, the user gathers objects from a moving baggage belt and builds a personal travel bag.

Japan Essentials
Tap objects on the conveyor belt to pack them.
Open Suitcase
Selected items will be stacked here. You can finish packing anytime.
